      static SExpr SExprs.TRUE

      Collects the :pattern annations from any nesting depth in a term and brings it to toplevel.

      Turn a KeY sort into an SMT sort (by prefixing SExprs.SORT_PREFIX.

      Translate a single term to an SMTLib S-Expression.

      Constructors in de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2 with parameters of type SExpr 
      Constructor and Description
      SExpr(SExpr... children)
      Create a new s-expr without atomic name (set to "") with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, SExpr... children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, SExpr.Type type, SExpr... children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and a given type.
      Constructor parameters in de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2 with type arguments of type SExpr 
      Constructor and Description
      SExpr(java.util.List<SExpr> children)
      Create a new s-expr without atomic name (set to "") with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
      SExpr(java.lang.String name, java.util.List<SExpr> children)
      Create a new s-expr with children and type SExpr.Type.NONE.
